mapper.sql: peht.header_id as peb_id, peht.employee_id as pe_id, peht.hobby, peht.level_myself, peht.level_mechanism, peht.remarks, peht.instructions_flag, peht.check_flag, peht.id, peht.enabled_flag, peht.create_by, peht.update_time, peht.update_by, peht.create_time

${tAlias}.header_id as ${tAlias}_peb_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.hobby as ${tAlias}_hobby, ${tAlias}.level_myself as ${tAlias}_level_myself, ${tAlias}.level_mechanism as ${tAlias}_level_mechanism, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.instructions_flag as ${tAlias}_instructions_flag, ${tAlias}.check_flag as ${tAlias}_check_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_hobby_temp (header_id, employee_id, hobby, level_myself, level_mechanism, remarks, instructions_flag, check_flag, enabled_flag, create_by, update_time, update_by, create_time) values (#{employeeHobby.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{hobby,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{levelMyself,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{levelMechanism,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_hobby_temp set header_id = #{employeeHobby.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, hobby = #{hobby,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, level_myself = #{levelMyself,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, level_mechanism = #{levelMechanism,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, instructions_flag = #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, check_flag = #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
